entry.title: S2: EP 2: EXPOSED ROOTS: THE BOND SERIES
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,439Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 9

Summary: Arthur lifted his eyes to the Knight, finally. “Why did you kiss him?” “I already told you. We spoke.” “Of whoring?” “Of choice. And the difference between having one, and having none.” “And he couldn’t come to me,” Arthur sighed sadly. “Not with *that* word in his mind, in his ear. Not knowing the fury it could invoke in you. He didn’t want to hurt you.” “So you kissed him instead, thinking that would hurt less?” Arthur accused harshly. “No, I kissed him so he’d take me seriously. Words weren’t getting me anywhere. The two of you have been fighting this battle for *years*- so they haven’t gotten *you* anywhere, either. I knew it was time to be done with words. And I didn't overly much care at the time how *you* would feel about it. I cared about what *he* needed.” Gwaine chuckled, shaking his head. “He threw me clear across the Garden.”

entry.title: while there's still something left to save
entry.summary:
Author: Katiebabyangel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 47

Summary: In the aftermath of Arthur finding out about Merlin's magic, Arthur sneaks away without his manservant on a hunt that's meant to last a week. Three days in, a ransom demand comes for the prince. Merlin, annoyed, takes it upon himself to find the ungrateful prat and bring him home.Based on the prompt: “God, I hate you.” “You just saved my life!” “Finding someone else to hate is too much effort.” “And going on a huge quest to save me wasn’t?” “See, this is why I hate you. Nitpicking.”

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,328Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 53

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?""You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

entry.title: Rise, superior to Fortune
entry.summary:
Author: haloud

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,497Chapters: 4/54Kudos: 34

Summary: King Uther is dead. Long live the king.When an old enemy crawls from the grave and cuts Uther down, an inexperienced and grieving Prince Arthur is forced to take the throne. As king, Arthur will be tested by regular magical attacks, his father's conservative council, and his own self-doubt. Yet he faces an even greater foe: Uther's shadow stretches long and dark across the land of Camelot, and if Arthur wants to forge a golden future for his people, he must first unravel the sins of the past.Merlin is used to living in shadow, but serving the new king thrusts him out into the light. Torn between a need for secrecy and his budding friendship with Arthur, Merlin does his best to protect Camelot the only way he knows.But no one can hide forever in a place they call home. Arthur lacks his father's zealotry, but he's no friend to magic either. Can Merlin hold on long enough to soften Arthur's heart? Or will he be forced to spend the rest of his life fleeing the way he fled Ealdor, too strange and wild to ever feel safe?Or;BBC Merlin if Kilgarrah never whispered destiny in Merlin's ear.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Rising of the Future King
entry.summary:
Author: Javi_Sep

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,798Chapters: 5/37Kudos: 6

Summary: After 1,500 years waiting for Arthur's return, Merlin finally gets him back. However, the weight of a life defined by waiting, drowning in loneliness and protecting Arthur at the cost of losing himself has left him angry, exhausted and deeply depressed. Combined with an ancient prophecy Arthur now knows the truth about and a new threat rising on the horizon, everything they have fought for is at risk of falling apart. Can they face this new danger while struggling to understand what they truly mean to one another? Aka, the first part of a story in which Merlin must learn to stop living in fear, and Arthur must learn to become what the world needs him to be.

Will they have to courage to say what they have wanted to for so long?

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,170,978Chapters: 140/?Kudos: 1,736

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?
